name: Sarah Jenkins
review: Working with Kaffa completely transformed our acquisition pipeline. We were burning cash on Google Ads with little return. He came in, fixed our technical SEO, and within 6 months our organic traffic surpassed our paid traffic. Absolute game changer.

name: David Chen
review: The rare combination of a developer and a marketer. He didn't just run our Meta Ads; he rebuilt our checkout flow to be frictionless. Our ROAS hit 12x during Q4, and our cart abandonment dropped by half. Worth every penny.

name: Elena Rodriguez
review: Data-driven, transparent, and incredibly creative. Instead of generic marketing fluff, he provided actionable insights backed by Hotjar data and A/B testing. We saw a 45% lift in our core conversion rate in just 30 days.
